title: Coaching summary / presentation insight card
description: After slides are generated, show a coaching insight card above the slide preview — deck overview (slide count, topics covered), strongest section, weakest section, and one specific improvement suggestion. Adds summary field to metadata, updates system prompt to generate coaching insights, and builds a new CoachingInsight UI component. This is the most differentiated feature — no competitor does this.
acceptance_criteria: Coaching insight card appears above slides when summary metadata is present
Summary includes: deck overview, strongest section, weakest section, specific improvement suggestion
Model generates specific/opinionated coaching, not generic praise
Updates on each slide regeneration in Structure/Refine phases
notes: NEEDS PLANNING — do not implement until plan is approved by Beckham.
